title: Simplilearn is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Simplilearn is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Subject Matter Expert looking for your next big career move? Simplilearn in Indore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Simplilearn:
Simplilearn is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Simplilearn!
